title: poa iconia var. iconia
intro: Poa iconia var. iconia, also known as Blue Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa iconia var. iconia include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
